hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then cd /Users/abc/Desktop/Drive_Data/vision-rpa-agent && poetry run ruff check --fix "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null && poetry run ruff format "$FILE" --quiet 2>/dev/null; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] && [[ "$FILE" == */memory/* || "$FILE" == */agent/* || "$FILE" == */executors/* || "$FILE" == */hitl/* ]]; then cd /Users/abc/Desktop/Drive_Data/vision-rpa-agent && poetry run mypy "$FILE" --ignore-missing-imports --no-error-summary 2>/dev/null | grep -E 'error:|warning:' | head -5 || true; fi

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'pyautogui\.click\([0-9]|pyautogui\.moveTo\([0-9]'; then echo '[HOOK BLOCK] Pixel-coordinate pyautogui calls are not allowed in this project. Use Playwright selectors (browser) or pywinauto UIA (desktop).'; exit 1; fi

CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git add.*\.env|git add -A|git add \.'  && echo "$CMD" | grep -qv 'env\.example'; then echo '[HOOK BLOCK] Refusing git add that may stage .env or credential files. Stage specific files by name (e.g. git add config/settings.py).'; exit 1; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; CONTENT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT"; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'anthropic\.Anthropic|from anthropic import|import anthropic'; then echo '[HOOK WARN] anthropic SDK detected. This project uses on-prem LLM only (Ollama/vLLM). Use openai SDK with INFERENCE_URL pointing to local server.'; fi

CONTENT="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT"; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'confidence[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*0\.[0-9]+' && ! echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE 'confidence_threshold|financial_confidence_threshold|CONFIDENCE_'; then echo '[HOOK WARN] Hardcoded confidence value detected. Use settings.confidence_threshold (0.75) or settings.financial_confidence_threshold (0.90) — never inline magic numbers for thresholds.'; fi

cd /Users/abc/Desktop/Drive_Data/vision-rpa-agent && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$' | head -3); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then echo "[HOOK] Modified Python files — run tests before committing:"; echo "$CHANGED"; echo "  poetry run pytest tests/ -q"; fi
